8 Services Under One Roof

Use your sessions on any of these

Mix and match based on how you feel. Every session is in a private suite.

Cryotherapy
2-3.5 min at -175°F. Boosts metabolism, supports detox and immunity, lifts mood.
Detox • Metabolism • Mood
Infrared Sauna
45 min private suite with full-spectrum heat. Promotes recovery, detox, and radiant skin.
Detox • Skin • De-Stress
Cold Plunge
3-5 min at 47°F. Accelerates recovery, boosts metabolism, sharpens mental clarity.
Recovery • Energy • Focus
Red Light Therapy
15 min full-length light walls. Rejuvenates skin, supports anti-aging, boosts cellular energy.
Anti-Aging • Skin • Energy
Contrast Therapy
Private suite alternating infrared sauna and cold plunge. The ultimate recovery combo.
Recovery • Metabolism • Detox
Compression Massage
30 min rhythmic air pressure for legs or hips. Boosts circulation, enhances recovery, melts stress.
De-Stress • Recovery
Light Facial
30 min non-invasive LED facial customized for acne or anti-aging. Reveal your healthiest glow.
Anti-Aging • Skin
Oxygen Therapy
Up to 95% pure oxygen with herbal aromatherapy. Sharpens focus, boosts energy, supports anti-aging.
Energy • Focus • Anti-Aging

Members save 20-25% on IV Drips, Nutrient Shots & NAD+

Energy, immunity, anti-aging, and recovery delivered directly. From 5 min vitamin shots to 2+ hour NAD+ anti-aging sessions. FSA/HSA accepted.

Here's the Deal

No gimmicks. Genuinely risk-free.

Reserve your founding membership, try 8 core services during VIP week before we officially open, and only stay if you love it.

Reserve Your Spot

2

Before the public gets in, you try all 8 services at no cost. Cryotherapy, sauna, cold plunge, the works.

3

Love It or Cancel

If you love it, your low rate is locked for life. If not, cancel and keep the 8 free sessions. No hard feelings.
